haikus.haiku:
Creamy sweetness swirls,
Crisp crust cradles joy within,
Whipped clouds dance on top.
Happy #NationalCoconutCreamPieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunbeams on bare feet,
Cool grass tickles joyfully,
Freedom in each step.
Happy #NoSocksDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles gently glow,
Echoing tales of laughter,
Joyful hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayHarryTruman from @ClamBakeSanta
